title: Stream Source Artifact Context
description: Validates artifact.context for application/vnd.agience.stream+json artifacts. Represents a live stream source (OBS, browser, etc.).

status.description: Current stream status. Updated by the stream gateway.

ingest_url.description: RTMP ingest URL for the stream source.

transcript_artifact_id.description: ID of the latest transcript artifact (created on stream end).
